item.title: 雷军：小米坚持十倍投入打造一台安全的好车
item.guid: 雷军：小米坚持十倍投入打造一台安全的好车
item.description:
Last night, Xiaomi founder Lei Jun completed his first live broadcast after the Year of the Horse, with the theme "Xiaomi Auto Safety Special." 昨晚，小米创办人雷军完成了其在马年后的首场直播，主题为「小米汽车安全专场」。

During the live broadcast, Lei Jun mentioned that at Xiaomi Auto's first technical launch event in 2023, Xiaomi proposed "safety above all else." He pointed out that Xiaomi insists on a tenfold investment precisely to build a safe and good car. 直播中雷军提及，2023 年小米汽车第一次技术发布会上，小米就提出了「安全高于一切」。其指出， 小米坚持十倍投入，就是为了造一台安全的好车。

We believe that users are the starting point for everything, and safety is the foundation and prerequisite for everything; safety is above all else. Building a safe and good car has always been our original intention, and Xiaomi Auto's goal is to make the safest car in its class.

According to Lei Jun, Xiaomi Auto currently has a safety-related team of over 3500 people, including a "Safety Committee," "Full-Domain Safety Department," "Safety Defense Team," "Independent Accident Investigation Center," and "Safety Response Center." 据雷军介绍，小米汽车目前安全相关的团队超过 3500 人，拥有「安全委员会「「全域安全部」「安全防御团队」「独立的事故调查中心」「安全响应中心」等。

Lei Jun also introduced that the door handles of the new generation Xiaomi SU7 support electric unlocking in daily use, but after a collision, once the vehicle receives a collision signal, the door lock will automatically switch to mechanical unlocking mode, allowing the door to be opened mechanically by pulling outwards with force. 同时雷军还介绍，新一代小米 SU7 的门把手在日常支持电动解锁， 而在发生碰撞后，车辆收到碰撞信号后，门锁会自动切换至机械解锁模式，用力外拉即可机械开门。

It is reported that even in extreme situations where both large and small batteries are simultaneously powered off, the new generation SU7's door handles still retain pure mechanical unlocking capability. The door locks also feature triple power redundancy: large battery + DCDC, small battery, and a backup power supply located under the second-row seats, which can support unlocking all four doors. 据悉，新一代 SU7 即便在极端情况下，大小电池同时断电，门把手也依然保留纯机械解锁能力。门锁还具备三重供电冗余：大电池+DCDC、小电池、以及布置于二排座椅下方的备份电源，可以支持四门解锁。

Lei Jun also revealed during the live broadcast that Xiaomi is deeply involved in battery research and development and manufactures a portion of its battery packs itself, which helps to gain a deeper understanding of battery technology, better coordinate with suppliers, and strictly control battery quality and safety. 雷军还在直播中透露，小米深入参与电池研发，并且自己制造一部分的电池包，有助于更深入地掌握电池技术，更好地与供应商协同配合，严格把控电池的质量和安全。

According to him, Xiaomi currently has a battery R&D team of over 220 people. Since its establishment, 486 battery system-related patents have been submitted, and 190 have been approved so far. 据其介绍，小米当前有超过 220 人的电池研发团队，成立至今，电池系统相关专利提交了 486 篇，目前已经获批 190 篇。

The future goal of Xiaomi Auto's battery factory is to build a benchmark factory and a lighthouse factory for battery manufacturing , replicating advanced battery manufacturing capabilities across the entire industry chain and enhancing the systemic capabilities of the industrial supply chain. 未来小米汽车电池工厂的目标，是打造电池制造的标杆工厂、灯塔工厂 ，把先进的电池制造能力复制给整个产业链，提升产业供应链的体系能力。

According to ChinaEV Home, a set of spy photos of a suspected unreleased new Xiaomi supercar model has been revealed. 另据 ChinaEV Home 消息，其公布了一组疑似小米未发布的全新超级跑车车型的谍照图。

ChinaEV Home reported that the model was captured in Barcelona, and the wheel hubs bear the "XIAOMI" logo. From the leaked images, the vehicle appears very muscular, with exaggerated wheel arch flares, and one of the images shows a boomerang-shaped design at the rear of the vehicle. ChinaEV Home 介绍，该台车型于巴塞罗那被抓拍到，并且车轮毂上印有「XIAOMI」的 LOGO 内容。从曝光的图片来看，车辆肌肉感十足，四轮轮拱幅度十分夸张，并且从其中一张图可以看出，车辆尾部有回旋镖造型的设计。

The report indicates that the new car is expected to be exhibited at MWC 2026 this year. 报道指出，该台新车预计将在今年的 MWC 2026 上展出。

item.title: OpenAI 宣布获得超千亿美元融资
item.guid: OpenAI-宣布获得超千亿美元融资
item.description:
Last night, OpenAI finally announced the completion of a new round of financing totaling $110 billion, with a pre-investment valuation as high as $730 billion. 昨晚，OpenAI 终于宣布完成 1100 亿美元新一轮融资，投前估值高达 7300 亿美元。

Specifically, for this financing round: SoftBank invested $30 billion, Nvidia invested $30 billion, and Amazon invested $50 billion. With this financing, OpenAI's valuation is now directly approaching that of Tesla. 具体来看该笔融资： 软银投 300 亿美元、英伟达投 300 亿美元、亚马逊投 500 亿美元。 而拥有了该笔融资后的 OpenAI，估值更是直逼特斯拉。

This money will be used respectively for "collaborating with Nvidia to acquire next-generation inference chips," "reaching more enterprise customers through Amazon AWS," and "supporting the company's transformation from a research institution to a global product company." 而这笔钱将分别用于「与英伟达合作获取下一代推理芯片」「通过亚马逊 AWS 触达更多企业客户」和「支撑公司从研究型机构向全球产品公司转型」。

In addition to investing money, Amazon also signed a strategic cooperation agreement with OpenAI: 除了砸钱，亚马逊还与 OpenAI 签署了 战略合作协议：

    AWS will become the exclusive third-party cloud distribution channel for OpenAI's Frontier platform;

    Both parties will jointly develop a Stateful Runtime Environment, allowing AI Agents to remember context and call tools;

    OpenAI will consume 2 gigawatts of Trainium computing power for training and inference.

Meanwhile, Microsoft also urgently issued a statement to "maintain stability": its partnership with OpenAI remains unchanged. 与此同时，微软也紧急发声明「维稳」：与 OpenAI 的合作关系一切照旧。

    Azure remains the exclusive cloud service provider for OpenAI API;

    Microsoft retains exclusive licensing for OpenAI models and IP;

    The revenue-sharing model remains unchanged.

In addition, OpenAI also revealed a set of astonishing data: ChatGPT's weekly active users exceeded 900 million, paid enterprise users surpassed 9 million, and consumer subscribers reached over 50 million. 另外，OpenAI 还晒出了一组恐怖数据：ChatGPT 周活跃用户突破 9 亿，付费企业用户超过 900 万，消费者订阅用户达到 5000 万+。

OpenAI stated that January and February this year are expected to be the two months with the highest number of new subscribers in the company's history. OpenAI 称今年 1 月和 2 月有望成为公司历史上新增订阅用户最多的两个月。

item.title: 魅族：暂停国内手机新品自研硬件项目
item.guid: 魅族：暂停国内手机新品自研硬件项目
item.description:
Meizu 22

Recently, it has been reported that Meizu's mobile phone business has effectively ceased operations and will officially delist in March 2026. 近期，有报道称魅族手机业务已经实质性停摆，并将于 2026 年 3 月正式退市。

Yesterday, Meizu Technology issued an announcement in response. It stated that the company will undergo a strategic transformation in the future to find a path for healthy operation and continuous innovation: 昨日，魅族科技方面发布公告进行回应。其表示，公司未来将进行战略转型，找到一条让自身健康经营和持续创新的道路：

In the future, it will suspend new domestic mobile phone self-developed hardware projects and actively engage with third-party hardware partners, while existing businesses will not be affected (overseas mobile phone business, AI glasses, and PANDAER).

Meizu mentioned that the biggest reason for this strategic transformation is the fierce competition in the domestic mobile phone market, coupled with the continuous surge in memory prices, which made the normal commercialization of the next new products unfeasible. 魅族提到， 本次战略转型最大原因是因国内手机市场竞争激烈，同时内存价格持续暴涨，导致下一步新产品的正常商业化变成了不可为。

It is reported that Meizu will subsequently shift from a hardware-led approach to an AI-driven software product-led development direction, and build a well-operating enterprise based on the Flyme open ecosystem. 据悉，魅族后续将从过去以硬件为主导转向以 AI 驱动软件产品为主导的发展方向，并打造以 Flyme 开放生态系统为基座的良性运作的企业。

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station", third-party brands are already in contact with the Flyme system, adopting the "new device, new terminal + Powered by Flyme" solution. 据博主「数码闲聊站」消息， 已有第三方品牌在接触 Flyme 系统，采用「新机新终端+Powered by Flyme」方案。

In January this year, Wan Zhiqiang, CMO of Xingji Meizu Group China, stated at an event that the current significant increase in memory prices has had a huge impact on mobile phone business plans, and the Meizu 22 Air launch plan will be canceled. He then revealed that Meizu 23 would still be released in 2026. However, it is reported that the project is no longer substantially progressing. 今年 1 月，星纪魅族集团中国区 CMO 万志强曾在活动上表示，当前内存的大幅上涨对手机商业计划是巨大的冲击，魅族 22 Air 将取消上市计划。其当时透露魅族 23 仍将在 2026 年发布。但据报道，该项目已经不再实质性推进。

item.title: 黄仁勋：今年游戏显卡或会迎来供应紧张
item.guid: 黄仁勋：今年游戏显卡或会迎来供应紧张
item.description:
According to "Tom's Hardware", Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently issued a warning during the latest earnings call, stating that consumer-grade gaming graphics cards will face severe supply shortages in the coming quarters. 据「Tom’s Hardware」报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋近期在最新的电话财报会上发出预警，称未来几个季度，消费级游戏显卡将面临严重的供应短缺。

Huang Jensen stated at the conference that Nvidia's gaming graphics card supply will be very tight in the first half of fiscal year 2027 (starting at the end of January 2026), and market visibility for the second half remains limited. 黄仁勋在会上表示， 英伟达 2027 财年（即 2026 年 1 月底开始）上半年的游戏显卡供应将非常紧张，且下半年的市场能见度依然有限。

He frankly stated: "While we very much want to provide more capacity, we expect the situation to be extremely tight in the coming quarters, and whether it can improve by the end of the year remains to be seen." 其直言：「尽管我们非常希望提供更多产能，但预计未来几个季度的情况将极其紧张，年底前能否改善目前仍有待观察。」

The report analyzes that the shortage of consumer-grade gaming graphics cards may be due to "consumer capacity shifting to AI GPUs" and "GDDR7 memory supply bottlenecks." 报道分析指出，消费级游戏显卡供应短缺或因「消费级产能转向 AI GPU」和「GDDR7 显存供货瓶颈」。

According to Nvidia data, its gaming and professional visualization business contributed $19.233 billion in revenue in the last fiscal year. Of this, GeForce gaming graphics card sales reached $16.042 billion, a year-on-year increase of 41%. 据英伟达数据显示，其游戏与专业视觉业务在上一财年贡献了 192.33 亿美元营收。其中，GeForce 游戏显卡销售额达 160.42 亿美元，同比增长 41%。

According to statistics from research firm Jon Peddie Research, Nvidia's desktop GPU shipments in the first three quarters of 2025 were approximately 30.4 million units, already exceeding the total sales of 30.2 million units for the entire year of 2024. 而据调研机构 Jon Peddie Research 统计，英伟达在 2025 年前三个季度的桌面 GPU 出货量约为 3040 万块，已超过 2024 年全年 3020 万块的总销量。

It is worth noting that, due to memory price fluctuations, Nvidia's AI computer DGX Spark announced a price increase of $700 (currently priced at 4699 yuan, approximately RMB 32229), and this price increase will apply to all regions. 值得一提的是，因内存价格影响， 英伟达的 AI 计算机 DGX Spark 宣布涨价 700 美元 （目前售价 4699 元，约合人民币 32229 元），并且本次涨价将适用于所有地区。

item.title: DeepSeek 悄悄上线新论文，北大清华联创
item.guid: DeepSeek-悄悄上线新论文，北大清华联创
item.description:
Recently, DeepSeek, in collaboration with Peking University and Tsinghua University, quietly published a paper, officially releasing a new technical solution called DualPath, which primarily addresses the historical data reading bottleneck encountered by large AI models when executing complex multi-turn tasks. 近期，DeepSeek 联合北京大学与清华大学悄悄上线了一篇论文，正式发布名为 DualPath 的新技术方案，重点解决了 AI 大模型在执行复杂多轮任务时遭遇的历史数据读取瓶颈。

According to the paper, when AI systems process ultra-long contexts, the two computational modules responsible for "processing input information" and "generating text responses" experience data channel resource mismatch. 据论文介绍，现在 AI 系统在处理超长上下文时，负责「处理输入信息」和「生成文本回答」的两个计算模块，会出现数据通道资源错配的情况。

To address this issue, the new DualPath breaks the conventional single-line transmission limitation, allowing historical data to first enter the "response generation" module through an idle channel, and then instantly forward it to the "input processing" module using the cluster's internal high-speed network. 针对此问题， 新的 DualPath 打破了常规的单线传输限制，允许历史数据先通过闲置通道进入「生成回答」模块，随后利用集群内部的高速网络，瞬间转发给「处理输入」模块。

Official evaluation data shows that when processing real and complex AI tasks, this technology boosts offline processing throughput by up to 1.87 times and online service throughput by an average of 1.96 times. 官方评估数据显示，在处理真实复杂的 AI 任务时， 该技术将离线处理吞吐量最高提升 1.87 倍，在线服务吞吐量平均提升 1.96 倍。

Currently, large models are rapidly evolving towards "agents" with autonomous planning capabilities. AI frequently needs to review contexts tens of thousands of words long, causing system performance constraints to shift from "insufficient computing power" to "slow data transmission." 当前，大模型正快速向具备自主规划能力的「智能体（Agent）」方向演进，AI 需要频繁回顾动辄数万字的上下文，导致系统性能的制约因素已从「算力不足」转变为「数据传输太慢」。

The validation of DualPath technology proves that by optimizing the underlying data flow, idle resources can be significantly revitalized without increasing hardware procurement costs. 而 DualPath 技术的验证，证明了通过优化底层数据流向，可以在不增加硬件采购成本的情况下大幅盘活闲置资源。

🎤 DeepSeek, you know what everyone is still waiting for. (V4 still hasn't appeared) 🎤 DeepSeek，你知道大家还在等待什么东西的。（V4 依然没有出现）

item.title: 今年全球手机市场或将陷入暴跌
item.guid: 今年全球手机市场或将陷入暴跌
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, citing IDC, global smartphone shipments are expected to shrink significantly by 12.9% in 2026, severely impacted by the storage chip supply crisis. 据彭博社援引机构 IDC 消息，受存储芯片供应危机的严重影响，2026 年全球智能手机出货量预计将大幅萎缩 12.9%。

Specifically, IDC predicts that global smartphone shipments in 2026 will drop from 1.26 billion units in the previous year to approximately 1.1 billion units. 具体来看， IDC 预测 2026 年全球智能手机出货量将从上一年的 12.6 亿部降至约 11 亿部。

Analysis indicates that the global storage supply is extremely tight due to the continuous squeeze from AI tasks' demand for advanced storage chips, forcing mobile phone manufacturers to adjust business strategies, cut back on low-margin entry-level models, and push consumers towards high-end devices. 分析指出，受人工智能任务对先进存储芯片需求的持续挤压，全球存储供应极度紧张，迫使手机制造商调整业务策略，削减利润微薄的入门级机型并推动消费者转向高端设备。

Analysts at Counterpoint, another research firm, stated that the industry has never experienced such a drastic decline and have declared 2026 to be "the worst year in smartphone history." 另一家调研机构 Counterpoint 的分析师称，行业从未经历过如此剧烈的下滑，并定调 2026 年将成为「智能手机历史上最糟糕的一年」。

It is reported that due to the sharp increase in upstream memory and storage chip costs, the industry widely believes that 2026 will be the "first year of major price increases" for the mobile phone industry. 据悉，受上游内存与存储芯片成本的急剧攀升，行业普遍认为 2026 年将成为手机行业的「大涨价元年」。

Recently, multiple supply chain and channel insiders have also confirmed that the procurement cost of smartphone storage chips has increased by over 80% compared to the same period last year, with no signs of the price hike slowing down. 近期也有多家供应链与渠道人士确认，智能手机存储芯片采购成本较去年同期已上涨超过 80%，且涨势仍未见放缓迹象。

Affected by this, mainstream brands such as OPPO, OnePlus, vivo, Xiaomi, iQOO, and Honor are planning to initiate a new round of price adjustments in early March. This will be the largest and most significant collective price adjustment in the past five years. Some analyses even suggest that the budget phone market might face the dilemma of "loss upon release, loss upon sale." 受此影响，OPPO、一加、vivo、小米、iQOO、荣耀等主流品牌已拟定于 3 月初启动新一轮价格调整，这将成为近五年来规模最大、涨幅最显著的一轮集体调价。甚至有分析之处，千元机市场或将迎来「发布即亏，卖出即赔」的窘境。

Recently, Hu Xinxin, product manager for Xiaomi REDMI, also commented on the matter, stating that the current storage super cycle is truly a "ghost story" series for mobile phone manufacturers. 日前，小米 REDMI 产品经理胡馨心也就此事发表了看法，她表示，当前的存储超级周期对手机厂商而言，真是「鬼故事」系列。

item.title: xAI 又一名创始人离职：要睡够 8 小时
item.guid: xAI-又一名创始人离职：要睡够-8-小时
item.description:
Yesterday, Toby Pohlen, one of xAI's 12 co-founders, announced his departure. 昨天，xAI 12 位联合创始人之一的 Toby Pohlen 发文宣布离职。

Interestingly, Toby mentioned in his resignation statement that his next priorities are to "get more than 8 hours of sleep," write down everything he has learned, and then carefully consider what he wants to do next. 有趣的是，Toby 在离职文案中提到， 自己的下一个优先事项是「睡个超过 8 小时的觉」，另外把学到的所有东西都写下来，然后好好思考下一步想做什么。

It is understood that Pohlen was responsible for coordinating xAI's "Macrohard" department. This department was established during xAI's recent organizational restructuring, with its core business focusing on AI software development run by digital agents. 据了解，Pohlen 负责统筹 xAI 旗下的「Macrohard」部门。该部门设立于 xAI 近期的组织架构重组期间，核心业务聚焦于由数字智能体运行的 AI 软件开发。

According to public data, 7 of xAI's initial 12 co-founders have left within less than three years. 而据公开数据显示， xAI 初始的 12 位联合创始人中已有 7 位在不到三年内离开。

Besides Pohlen, Jimmy Ba and Tony Wu left earlier this month, and Greg Yang announced his retreat behind the scenes last month due to a Lyme disease diagnosis; Kyle Kosic, Igor Babuschkin, and Christian Szegedy had already successively departed between 2024 and 2025. 除 Pohlen 外，Jimmy Ba 和 Tony Wu 于本月早些时候离职，Greg Yang 上月因确诊莱姆病宣布退居幕后；而 Kyle Kosic、Igor Babuschkin 和 Christian Szegedy 则已于 2024 年至 2025 年间相继退出。

Bloomberg reported that the high-level personnel changes come at a time of significant capital and business transformation for xAI. In February this year, xAI officially completed its merger with SpaceX, a deal that valued the combined entity at $1.25 trillion. 彭博社报道指出，此次高层人事动荡正值 xAI 的重大资本与业务转型期。今年 2 月，xAI 正式与 SpaceX 完成合并，该交易使合并后实体的估值达到 1.25 万亿美元。

According to sources, SpaceX is currently preparing for a public listing, which is widely expected to become the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history. 另据知情人士透露，SpaceX 目前正筹备公开上市，市场普遍预计这或将成为史上最大规模的首次公开募股（IPO）。

item.title: Meta 与 Google 签下十亿美元算力大单
item.guid: Meta-与-Google-签下十亿美元算力大单
item.description:
According to The Information, Meta has signed a multi-billion dollar, multi-year agreement with Google to lease the latter's AI chips for developing future new AI models. 据《The Information》报道，Meta 已与 Google 签署了一项价值数十亿美元的多年期协议，租赁后者的人工智能芯片用于开发未来的新款 AI 模型。

Sources revealed that the agreement is a long-term leasing contract spanning several years, aimed at meeting the massive computing power demands required for developing AI models. 知情人士透露， 该协议为一项跨越数年的长期租赁合同，旨在满足开发 AI 模型所需的庞大算力需求。

The report also indicated that Meta is currently negotiating with Google to directly procure TPUs (Tensor Processing Units) for its own data centers, with related purchases potentially materializing as early as next year, though specific progress remains uncertain. 报道还指出，Meta 目前正与谷歌就在其自有数据中心直接采购 TPU（张量处理单元）进行谈判，相关采购最快或于明年落地，但具体进展尚无法确定。

According to Reuters, prior to the disclosure of this agreement, Meta had recently made multiple deployments and large-scale procurements in the field of AI infrastructure. 而据路透社报道，在本次协议曝光前，Meta 近期已在 AI 基础设施领域进行了多点布局与大规模采购。

Earlier this week, AMD announced it would sell up to $60 billion worth of AI chips to Meta; earlier this month, Meta also reached an agreement with Nvidia to procure its current and future generation AI chips. 本周早些时候，AMD 宣布将向 Meta 出售价值高达 600 亿美元的 AI 芯片；本月稍早，Meta 亦与英伟达（Nvidia）达成了采购其当前及未来一代 AI 芯片的协议。

For Google, this collaboration with Meta represents a significant step forward in its strategy to commercialize its underlying computing power. As previously reported, Google is actively promoting its self-developed TPUs as a viable alternative to Nvidia's dominant GPU market. 而对 Google 来说，本次与 Meta 合作是其底层算力商业化战略的重要进展。据此前报道，Google 正积极推动自研 TPU 成为英伟达主导的 GPU 市场之外的可行替代方案。

item.title: 苹果否认夸大 AI Siri 预期
item.guid: 苹果否认夸大-AI-Siri-预期
item.description:
According to Reuters, on February 26 local time, Apple urged a San Jose federal judge to dismiss a proposed shareholder class-action lawsuit. 据路透社报道，当地时间 2 月 26 日，苹果敦促圣何塞联邦法官驳回一项拟议的股东集体诉讼。

The report stated that the lawsuit accuses Apple of misleading investors regarding the AI capabilities of its voice assistant Siri and its compliance with the Epic Games antitrust injunction. 报道称，该诉讼指控苹果在其语音助手 Siri 的 AI 能力及遵守 Epic Games 反垄断禁令合规性方面误导投资者。

According to court documents, the plaintiffs accuse Apple of overstating Siri's AI feature upgrades at its June 2024 developer conference and falsely claiming compliance with a court injunction regarding App Store commissions. 根据法庭文件，原告指控苹果在 2024 年 6 月的开发者大会上过度吹捧 Siri 的 AI 功能点升级，并虚假陈述其已遵守关于 App Store 佣金的法院禁令。

It is reported that Apple not only postponed some upgrades to Siri's AI features until March 2025, but its CEO Tim Cook also publicly admitted two months later that developing a more personalized Siri "took longer than we expected." 据悉，苹果不仅于 2025 年 3 月推迟了 Siri AI 功能的部分升级，其 CEO 库克也在两个月后公开承认，开发更具个性化的 Siri「所花的时间比我们预期的要长」。

Apple responded by stating that there is no evidence that executives knew key Siri AI features would be significantly delayed when promoting AI progress, nor is there any evidence that the delay led to a decline in iPhone 16 series sales. 苹果对此回应称， 并无证据表明高管在推介 AI 进展时预知关键的 Siri AI 功能会大幅跳票，更无证据显示延迟导致了 iPhone 16 系列的销售下滑。

Regarding the injunction related to the Epic case, Apple emphasized that it never guaranteed its compliance procedures were "foolproof." 而针对 Epic 案相关的禁令，苹果强调其从未保证合规程序是「万无一失」的。

It is reported that the presiding judge had previously severely criticized Apple's 27% external sales commission system, characterizing it as "willful non-compliance." In its latest defense, Apple stated that the plaintiffs' forced association of temporary fluctuations in the company's stock price in 2025 with alleged "securities fraud" is a logical leap lacking factual support. 据报道，监管法官此前曾严厉批评苹果设立的 27% 外部销售佣金体系，并将其定性为「蓄意违规」。苹果在最新的申辩中指出，原告将 2025 年间公司股价的暂时波动强行关联至所谓「证券欺诈」是缺乏事实支撑的逻辑跃迁。

item.title: 三星三折叠可能一代亡？总裁回应
item.guid: 三星三折叠可能一代亡？总裁回应
item.description:
Galaxy Z TriFold Triple Fold

According to Bloomberg, Choi Won-joon, President of Samsung Electronics' Mobile eXperience (MX) division, revealed the commercial status and R&D progress of several products in an interview: 据彭博社报道，三星电子移动体验（MX）部门总裁崔元俊在接受采访时透露了多款产品的商业情况以及研发进度：

    Galaxy Z TriFold Triple Fold:

Although the first batch of this triple-fold device sold out, Choi Won-joon admitted that due to its overly complex engineering and its thickness and weight when closed, it can currently only be considered a niche luxury item. 该款三折叠虽然首批售罄，但崔元俊坦言，由于工程太复杂且闭合时又厚又重，它目前只能算小众奢侈品。

In addition, Choi Won-joon even half-jokingly said, "As head of R&D, this was not a project I initially wanted to do at all." Regarding the future, he directly revealed: Internally, there are doubts about whether to develop the next generation, and no decision has been made yet to launch a new model. 除此之外，崔元俊甚至半开玩笑地说：「作为研发主管，最初这根本不是我想做的项目。」 对于未来，他直接交底：内部正在怀疑是否该开发下一代，目前还没有推出新款的决定。

On the Z Fold product line, Samsung may launch a "wide-fold" like product this summer, offering some of the entertainment features of a tri-fold at a lower price. 而 Z Fold 产品线上，三星或会在今年夏季推出一款类似「阔折叠」的产品，以更低的价格提供部分三折叠享受的娱乐功能。

    Ultra-thin Edge Series:

Choi Won-joon admitted in an interview that the Galaxy S25 Edge, an ultra-thin model, has seen relatively "sluggish" sales compared to other models from the company, and due to lack of consumer interest, the next generation of ultra-thin models is currently "pending". 崔元俊在采访时坦言，Galaxy S25 Edge 这一超薄机型相较于自家其他机型，销量上相对「低迷」，并且由于消费者不买单，下一代超薄机型目前也在「待定」状态。

    S-Pen on phones:

Choi Won-joon revealed that Samsung is developing the next generation S-Pen, and will also provide a new display structure on future new phones to reduce the compromises associated with equipping an S-Pen. He also emphasized that the S-Pen will continue to be one of Samsung's core technologies. 崔元俊透露三星正在研发下一代 S-Pen，并且还会在未来的新机上提供新的显示结构，从而降低配备 S-Pen 所带来的取舍。其还强调，S-Pen 将继续作为三星的核心技术之一。

    Privacy screen protector is extremely difficult, delayed by one year:

The exclusive interview also revealed that the S26 Ultra finally features a hardware-based "privacy display," but Choi Won-joon admitted that this feature encountered technical bottlenecks and was originally planned to debut on the S25 Ultra last year. 专访中还透露，S26 Ultra 终于上了基于硬件的「隐私显示屏」，但崔元俊承认，这功能遇到了技术瓶颈，原本是打算去年在 S25 Ultra 上首发的。

item.title: 领克回应「高速语音关大灯」：已完成优化方案
item.guid: 领克回应「高速语音关大灯」：已完成优化方案
item.description:
Recently, some netizens posted that while driving a Lynk & Co Z20 at night, they used the voice assistant to turn off the reading light, but the vehicle turned off the headlights and other exterior lights, leaving the road in complete darkness, ultimately leading to a collision on the highway. 近期，有网友发帖称，自己夜间驾驶领克 Z20 时，使用语音助手进行阅读灯关闭，车辆却将大灯等车外灯光关闭，导致道路一片漆黑，最终在高速发生碰撞。

On February 26, Mu Jun, Deputy General Manager of Lynk & Co Automobile Sales Co., Ltd., responded by stating that for the above situation, Lynk & Co immediately completed a voice control optimization plan and pushed updates via the cloud. Subsequently, headlights can only be turned off manually while the vehicle is in motion. 2 月 26 日，领克汽车销售有限公司副总经理穆军发文回应表示，对于上述情况，领克方面第一时间完成了语音控制优化方案，并通过云端推送更新，后续在行驶状态下只能通过手动控制大灯关闭。

He stated that he appreciates user feedback and supervision, and deeply apologizes for the trouble caused by the accident, adding, "Lynk & Co always guards your safety." 其表示，感谢用户的反馈与监督，并对上述事故带来的困扰深表歉意，「领克始终守护您的安全。」

item.title: 豆包回应「手机助手存在安全漏洞」：黑公关
item.guid: 豆包回应「手机助手存在安全漏洞」：黑公关
item.description:
On February 27, Doubao Mobile Assistant posted that a batch of content claiming "Doubao Mobile Assistant has security vulnerabilities" has recently appeared online. 2 月 27 日，豆包手机助手发文表示，近期网上出现一批声称「豆包手机助手存在安全漏洞」的内容。

Doubao stated that the relevant authors maliciously spread and exaggerated the risks of vulnerabilities without reporting the vulnerability information to the manufacturer. In response, Doubao issued a statement: 豆包方面表示，相关作者在未向厂商报告漏洞信息的情况下，恶意传播并夸大漏洞风险。对此，豆包发布声明：

    ByteDance attaches great importance to user information security and has an open security vulnerability response platform that provides generous rewards to vulnerability reporters. As of now, Doubao has not received detailed reports of mobile assistant vulnerabilities, nor has it received notifications from cybersecurity regulatory authorities. According to the national "Regulations on the Management of Network Product Security Vulnerabilities," unauthorized public disclosure of vulnerabilities is suspected of being illegal.

    The circulated vulnerability demonstration video requires users to actively ask AI to view malicious emails or SMS messages to trigger an attack. Without user instructions, AI will not automatically perform high-risk operations. Doubao Mobile Assistant has upgraded corresponding protective measures against the attack methods demonstrated in the video.

Doubao stated that any system will have vulnerabilities, and what is important is to responsibly disclose and fix them. It emphasized: 豆包表示，任何系统都会存在漏洞，重要的是负责任地披露和修复漏洞。其强调：

Against the backdrop of unverified information by authoritative bodies, non-compliant reporting to manufacturers, and a lack of complete technical details for relevant vulnerabilities, the appearance of a large volume of organized security scare content on online platforms is typical black public relations hype.

Doubao also stated that screen visual understanding and automated operation capabilities are cutting-edge technological innovation directions in the global AI terminal field, and Google's recently released new phones also feature automatic operation functions driven by similar technology to Doubao Mobile Assistant. 豆包还表示，屏幕视觉理解与自动化操作能力，是当前全球 AI 终端领域的前沿技术创新方向，谷歌近期发布的新款手机也搭载了与豆包手机助手同类技术驱动的自动操作功能。

It believes that the development and maturity of any cutting-edge technology require continuous iteration and improvement. 其认为：任何前沿技术的发展与成熟，都需要持续的迭代完善。

item.title: 影石创新：美国 337 调查终裁获胜，在美正常销售
item.guid: 影石创新：美国-337-调查终裁获胜，在美正常销售
item.description:
On February 27, Insta360 announced that the final ruling of the U.S. 337 investigation, which began in March 2024, has been settled: the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC) upheld the initial ruling, determining that all six of GoPro's allegations were unfounded. 2 月 27 日，影石创新发布公告，始于2024年3月的美国337调查终裁落定：美国国际贸易委员会（ITC）维持初裁，判定GoPro六项指控均不成立。

It is understood that the "337 investigation" originates from Section 337 of the U.S. Tariff Act of 1930 and is a trade remedy procedure for the ITC to examine whether imported products infringe intellectual property rights. Once infringement is determined, the ITC can issue an exclusion order prohibiting infringing products from entering the U.S. market. 据了解，「337 调查」源于《美国 1930 年关税法》第 337 条款，是 ITC 审查进口产品是否侵犯知识产权的贸易救济程序。一旦认定侵权，ITC 可发布排除令，禁止侵权产品进入美国市场。

Insta360 stated in the announcement: "This 337 investigation has not had a substantial impact on the company's production and operations. The company will continue to import and sell existing products in the United States without restrictions." 影石在公告中表示： 「本次 337 调查未对公司生产、经营造成实质性影响。公司将持续不受限制地在美国进口和销售现有产品。」

According to the ITC's final ruling, among the six patent disputes accused by GoPro, five were ruled as not constituting infringement or having invalid related patent rights; regarding the remaining design patent, Insta360's proposed new design was also confirmed by the ITC as not constituting infringement. 根据 ITC 终裁，GoPro 指控的六项专利争议中， 五项被裁定为不构成侵权或相关专利权无效；针对剩余一项外观专利，影石提出的新设计方案也获 ITC 确认不构成侵权。

Insta360 founder Liu Jingkang revealed that over 10 million US dollars were spent on legal fees to win this battle. He also believes that Insta360's market performance surpassing GoPro is a natural result of good product definition; the other half of the credit comes from the "cliff-like" lead of China's supply chain. 影石创始人刘靖康透露，为打赢这场仗花了超 1000 万美金的应诉费。同时他也认为，影石市场表现优于 GoPro，是产品定义好后自然发生的结果；另一半功劳则来自中国供应链的「断崖式」领先。

Data shows that Insta360 achieved a total operating revenue of 9.858 billion yuan in 2025, a year-on-year increase of 76.85%; the company has maintained its position as the global leader in the panoramic camera market for eight consecutive years, with a global market share exceeding 85%. 数据显示，影石 2025 年全年实现营业总收入 98.58 亿元，同比大增 76.85%；公司已连续八年稳居全球全景相机市场份额第一，全球市占率超过 85%。

item.title: 💡 Salesforce CEO 反驳「软件末日」：都不是第一次这样讲了
item.guid: 💡-Salesforce-CEO-反驳「软件末日」：都不是第一次这样讲了
item.description:
Recently, Marc Benioff, CEO of Salesforce, a customer relationship management software service provider, directly addressed market concerns that "AI agents will lead to the demise of the SaaS model" during the latest earnings call. 近期，客户关系管理软件服务提供商 Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff 在最新的财报电话会上，正面回应了「AI 智能体将导致 SaaS 模式消亡」的市场担忧。

Regarding the recent capital market's concern about "SaaSpocalypse," the theory that AI agents will disrupt the seat-based billing model, Benioff pointed out at the conference that the industry is not facing such a crisis for the first time, and enterprise-level SaaS has become more defensible due to the integration of AI agents. 针对近期资本市场担忧 AI 智能体将颠覆按座席收费模式的「SaaS 末日论（SaaSpocalypse）」，Benioff 在会上指出， 行业并非首次面临此类危机，而企业级 SaaS 因集成 AI 智能体而变得更具护城河。

According to TechCrunch, the unveiling of this view is seen by the industry as a direct counterattack against the overstepping behavior of underlying large model vendors. 而据 TechCrunch 报道，这一观点的抛出，被业界视为对底层大模型厂商越界行为的直接反击。

Earlier this month, when OpenAI launched its enterprise-grade agent Frontier, it presented a completely opposite roadmap: OpenAI intends to control the core of the technology stack, while downgrading SaaS providers that offer core business data to underlying system-of-record engines. This divergence in strategy is precisely the core trigger for the current wave of SaaS concept stock sell-offs. 本月早些时候，OpenAI 推出企业级智能体 Frontier 时展示了截然相反的路线图：OpenAI 意图掌控技术栈核心，而将提供核心业务数据的 SaaS 供应商降级为底层的系统记录引擎。而该路线分歧正是触发本轮 SaaS 概念股抛售潮的核心诱因。

Recently, Anthropic announced that Claude Code can automatically sort COBOL dependencies, generate documentation, and identify risks, raising market concerns about the impact on IBM's mainframe business. IBM's stock price recorded its largest single-day drop in nearly 26 years this Monday local time, with its market value evaporating by approximately 31 billion US dollars. 近期，Anthropic 宣布 Claude Code 能自动梳理 COBOL 依赖、生成文档并识别风险，引发市场对 IBM 主机业务受冲击的担忧，IBM 股价在当地时间本周一录得近 26 年最大单日跌幅，市值蒸发约 310 亿美元。

item.title: OPPO Find N6 将支持 AI 手写笔
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-将支持-AI-手写笔
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhou Yibao, head of OPPO Find series products, posted that the OPPO Find N6 will support an "AI stylus" and feature industry-first AI functions. 昨日，OPPO Find 系列产品负责人周意保发文透露，OPPO Find N6 将支持「AI 手写笔」，并且搭载行业首发的 AI 功能。

From the released images, the Find N6's AI stylus is equipped with a physical button and features a faceted design on the pen body. When a netizen in the comments section asked "how to store the AI stylus," Zhou Yibao responded, "Don't worry, this has already been solved." 从公布的图片来看，Find N6 的 AI 手写笔配备一枚实体按钮，并且笔杆带切面设计。评论区有网友提出「AI 手写笔要如何收纳」时，周意保回应称「放心，这个已经解决」。

Recently, the crease performance of the Find N6 has also been revealed. According to information displayed by "Guangdong News Broadcast," the Find N6's crease is claimed to be "so shallow it's almost invisible." 近期，Find N6 的折痕表现也已曝光。据《广东新闻联播》展示的信息显示，Find N6 的折痕号称「浅到几乎看不见」。

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," the new phone will debut two industry black technologies: "crease-free titanium alloy hinge" + "self-healing memory glass," and will earn the title of "the world's flattest" foldable phone. 另据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，新机将首发「无痕钛合金铰链」+「自修复记忆玻璃」两项行业黑科技，并将获得「全球最平整」折叠机称号。

"Digital Chat Station" also stated that "a certain international major manufacturer's foldable phone this year is also drawing inspiration from OPPO's solution, but is approximately half a year behind." 「数码闲聊站」还表示，「某国际大厂今年的折叠机也在借鉴 OPPO 的方案，但落后差不多半年」。

item.title: vivo X300 Ultra 将亮相 MWC 2026
item.guid: vivo-X300-Ultra-将亮相-MWC-2026
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo officially announced its participation in the Mobile World Congress 2026 (MWC 2026). 昨日，vivo 正式宣布将参展 2026 年世界移动通信大会（MWC 2026）。

It is reported that this year's conference will be held from March 2nd to 5th in Barcelona, and vivo's new flagship model, the X300 Ultra, will make its global debut during the exhibition. 据悉，本届大会将于 3 月 2 日至 5 日在巴塞罗那举行，vivo 全新旗舰机型 X300 Ultra 也将在展会期间迎来全球首次亮相。

The latest news indicates that the X300 Ultra integrates vivo's cutting-edge exploration results in mobile imaging and video technology, representing the culmination of vivo's years of deep cultivation in optical engineering, computational photography, and system-level optimization. 最新消息显示，X300 Ultra 融合了 vivo 在移动影像与视频技术方面的前沿探索成果，是 vivo 多年来深耕光学工程、计算摄影与系统级优化的集大成之作。

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," the X300 Ultra will globally debut Sony's 200-megapixel LYT-901 sensor, and will be equipped with a 200-megapixel periscope telephoto lens, as well as an industry-leading ultra-wide-angle lens. 据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，X300 Ultra 将全球首发索尼 2 亿像素 LYT-901 传感器，并配备一颗 2 亿像素潜望式长焦镜头，以及行业领先的超广角镜头。

In addition, the new phone will also bring an industry-exclusive 200mm+400mm dual fixed-focus teleconverter lens combination, with the 400mm focal length potentially becoming the ultimate solution for mobile telephoto photography. 此外，新机还将带来行业独有的 200mm+400mm 双定焦增距镜头组合，其中 400mm 焦段或将成为手机增距摄影的终极解决方案。

item.title: 联想超大音箱平板曝光
item.guid: 联想超大音箱平板曝光
item.description:
According to the list of winners for the iF Design Award 2026, Lenovo may launch a giant speaker tablet called Tab Plus Gen 2. 据 iF Design Award 2026 的获奖名单显示，联想或会推出一款名为 Tab Plus Gen 2 的巨型音箱平板。

From the pictures, the Tab Plus Gen 2 has a very large passive radiator unit on its back, combined with a ring stand, supporting various display modes such as horizontal, vertical, and hanging. 从图片来看，Tab Plus Gen 2 背部拥有一枚极大尺寸的被动辐射器单元，并且还结合了环形支架，支持横屏、竖屏以及悬挂等多种摆放模式。

According to reports, the Tab Plus Gen 2 will be equipped with a JBL 9-unit Pro speaker system, with a screen size of 12.1 inches and a resolution of 2.5K. 据介绍，Tab Plus Gen 2 将配备 JBL 9 单元 Pro 扬声器系统，屏幕尺寸为 12.1 英寸，分辨率为 2.5K。

Overall, the Tab Plus Gen 2 features a four-equal-bezel screen design, an silver aluminum alloy back cover, with both the volume and power buttons located on the back. 整机来看，Tab Plus Gen 2 采用四等边屏幕设计，采用银色铝合金后盖，并且音量键以及电源键均位于背部。

Interestingly, Lenovo has also designed a cross-body carrying bag for the tablet, which can store a stylus and display the back speaker on one side. 有趣的是，联想还为该平板设计了一款斜挎便携包，能够收纳手写笔以及单侧展示背部扬声器。

item.title: 阿里千问将发布多款 AI 硬件
item.guid: 阿里千问将发布多款-AI-硬件
item.description:
February 27th news: Following the surge in popularity of AI shopping during the Spring Festival, Alibaba's personal AI assistant "Qwen" has officially entered the AI hardware field, and will launch multiple AI hardware products of different forms for the global market this year. 2 月 27 日消息，继 AI 购物春节爆火后，阿里巴巴旗下个人 AI 助手「千问」正式进军 AI 硬件领域，今年将面向全球市场推出多款不同形态的 AI 硬件产品。

Qwen will launch its first eponymous AI glasses at the 2026 Mobile World Congress (MWC) in Barcelona, Spain, with pre-orders opening across all online and offline channels on March 2nd. 千问将在西班牙巴塞罗那举行的 2026 年世界移动通信大会（MWC）上发布首款同名 AI 眼镜，并于 3 月 2 日开启线上线下全渠道预约。

It is reported that Alibaba is building Qwen into an integrated software and hardware AI assistant across various terminal forms: Qwen, freed from mobile phones, will be able to capture more information from the physical world, understand user intentions in complex life scenarios, and unlock more possibilities for AI. 据悉，阿里正在将千问打造软硬一体、跨多种终端形态的 AI 助手：跳出手机的千问将能够捕获更多物理世界的信息，在复杂生活场景中理解用户意图，让 AI 解锁更多的可能性。

According to Alibaba insiders, in addition to AI glasses, Qwen will also successively release products such as AI rings and AI headphones within the year, and sell them to the global market. 据阿里内部人士透露，除 AI 眼镜之外，千问还会在年内陆续发布 AI 指环、AI 耳机等产品，并面向全球市场发售。

In addition, all newly launched AI glasses products from Alibaba in the future will be uniformly branded as "Qwen AI Glasses" for the global market. The already launched Quark AI Glasses will keep pace with Qwen AI Glasses in terms of feature updates and continue to enjoy Qwen AI services. 另外，未来阿里巴巴所有新上市 AI 眼镜产品将统一以「千问 AI 眼镜」（Qwen Glasses）品牌面向全球市场。已上市的夸克 AI 眼镜将与千问 AI 眼镜功能更新保持同步，持续享受千问 AI 服务。

item.title: 「迪士尼 × F1」宣布推出多款联名产品
item.guid: 「迪士尼-×-F1」宣布推出多款联名产品
item.description:
Yesterday, several "Disney × F1®" co-branded products were officially announced. 昨日，多款「迪士尼 × F1®」联名合作产品官宣。

  • Uniqlo: Available from March 9th, launching six styles of T-shirts (two exclusive versions each for adults and children's wear); 优衣库：3 月 9 日开售，推出供给六个款式的 T 恤（成人、童装各有两款独占版本）；
  • Gentle Monster: Releasing on March 7th, launching the new 2026 Circuit Series, and specially presenting "Disney × F1" global co-branded products; Gentle Monster：3 月 7 日发售，推出全新 2026 Circuit 系列，并特别呈现「Disney × F1」全球联名产品；
  • "Fuel the Magic" series products: Starting with the Chinese Grand Prix in March, "Fuel the Magic" pop-up offline stores will be launched. 「Fuel the Magic」系列产品：3 月的中国大奖赛开始，将会推出「Fuel the Magic」快闪线下门店。

It is worth noting that this "Disney × F1®" collaboration will also jointly launch the comic "Mickey × F1 Sprint to the Peak," which will be broadcast on WEBTOON's global platform, covering the entire 2026 F1 season. 值得关注的是，本次「迪士尼 × F1®」还将共同推出《米奇 ×F1 冲刺巅峰》漫画，将在 WEBTOON 的全球平台上播出，覆盖整个 2026 F1 赛季。

item.title: 消息称《GTA 6》发布日期不会再跳票
item.guid: 消息称《GTA-6》发布日期不会再跳票
item.description:
According to foreign media TheGamer, Take-Two has officially confirmed to Sony and Microsoft that "GTA 6" will be released as planned on November 19th this year, with no further delays. 据外媒 TheGamer 报道，Take-Two 已向索尼与微软正式确认《GTA 6》将按计划于今年 11 月 19 日发售，不再延期。

The report cites well-known industry insider Millie A, stating that Take-Two has issued official notifications to both PlayStation and Xbox console platforms, confirming that "GTA 6" development is on track and will be released as scheduled within the current fiscal year. 报道援引知名行业消息人士 Millie A 消息，Take-Two 已向 PlayStation 和 Xbox 两大主机平台发布正式通知，确认《GTA 6》的开发进度处于正轨，将在当前财年内如期发布。

The notification emphasizes that there are currently no plans for postponement, and the game's release window is "established and solid." Combined with previous information, the specific release date for the title is set for November 19th. 通知强调，目前没有任何推迟计划，该游戏的发行窗口已经「确立且稳固」。结合此前信息，该作的具体发售日期锁定在 11 月 19 日。

Previously, "GTA 6" had experienced an internal delay (originally scheduled for release in May this year), leading to frequent external speculation that it might be further postponed until 2027. 此前《GTA 6》曾经历过一次内部跳票（原定于今年 5 月发布），导致外界频繁猜测其可能进一步延期至 2027 年。

item.title: 首个蜜雪冰城主题公园拟选址出炉
item.guid: 首个蜜雪冰城主题公园拟选址出炉
item.description:
According to Dahe Daily, at the city-wide mobilization and deployment meeting held recently in Zhengzhou to promote a good start to the new year, Mixue Bingcheng Snow King City Theme Park was explicitly listed as a key support project, planned to be located in the Mixue Bingcheng flagship headquarters area. 据大河报消息，在郑州市日前召开的全市推动新一年良好开局动员部署会上，蜜雪冰城雪王城市主题乐园被明确列为重点支持项目，拟落地蜜雪冰城旗舰总部片区。

The report points out that this project signifies Mixue Bingcheng's entry into the cultural tourism sector. 报道指出，该项目意味着蜜雪冰城正在进军文旅赛道。

According to DaXiang News, the **park is centered around the Snow King IP**, creating a sweet and fantastical Snow King world. It plans multiple indoor themed experience areas, deeply integrating Mixue Ice Cream & Tea's global headquarters, global flagship store, and theme park into three major scenarios, creating a "play + shopping + experience" three-in-one experience system. 另据大象新闻消息， 乐园以雪王 IP 为核心 ，打造充满甜蜜与奇幻的雪王世界。规划多个室内主题体验区，深度融合蜜雪冰城全球总部、全球旗舰店与主题乐园三大场景，打造「游玩+购物+体验」三位一体的体验体系。

It's worth mentioning that the Mixue Ice Cream & Tea flagship headquarters area, located near Zhengzhou East High-speed Railway Station, has become a popular "check-in spot" for many young people and tourists; in the future, this area will also welcome "supermarket giant" Pang Dong Lai. 值得一提的是，蜜雪冰城旗舰总部片区位于郑州高铁东站附近，已经成为不少年轻人和游客的「打卡地」；未来这一片区周边还将迎来「商超顶流」胖东来。

item.title: Netflix 放弃收购后，华纳转向派拉蒙
item.guid: Netflix-放弃收购后，华纳转向派拉蒙
item.description:
Recently, Netflix has officially abandoned raising its acquisition offer for Warner Bros. 近期，Netflix 已正式放弃提高对华纳兄弟的收购报价。

According to the former, after Paramount made a higher offer, it believed that continuing to bid was "no longer financially attractive." 据前者消息，在派拉蒙提出更高报价后，其认为继续竞价已「不再具有财务吸引力」。

On the same day, **Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav posted a message wishing Netflix well, while the company announced its focus would shift to the higher-bidding Paramount.** 而在同一天， 华纳兄弟探索 CEO David Zaslav 发文祝福 Netflix，同时公司宣布目标转向出价更高的派拉蒙。

David Zaslav pointed out that once the board votes to approve the Paramount acquisition, it will create significant value for Warner Bros. shareholders. David Zaslav 指出，一旦董事会投票通过派拉蒙收购，那么这将会为华纳兄弟的股东们创造巨大价值。

Between Netflix and Warner Bros., with the termination of the merger agreement, the former will subsequently be paid a $2.8 billion breach of contract fee. According to informed sources, this amount will be paid by Paramount on their behalf. 而 Netflix 与华纳兄弟之间，随着并购合同终止，后续将向前者支付 28 亿美元的违约金。据知情人士透露该笔款项将由派拉蒙代为支付。

It is understood that this bidding war lasted several months. Warner Bros. Discovery had originally reached a preliminary merger agreement with Netflix in December 2025, attempting to integrate core streaming and film assets such as Warner Bros. Pictures, DC Studios, and HBO Max. 据了解，此次竞购战历时数月，华纳兄弟探索原本于 2025 年 12 月与奈飞达成初步合并协议，试图借此整合华纳兄弟影业、DC 工作室及 HBO Max 等核心流媒体与影视资产。

However, under multiple bidding interventions subsequently launched by Paramount, it ultimately succeeded in breaking the deadlock with a bid of $31 per share, totaling nearly $111 billion. 但在派拉蒙随后发起的多次竞价干预下，其最终以每股 31 美元、总价近 1110 亿美元的筹码成功破局。

item.title: 《天才枪手》重映定档 3 月
item.guid: 《天才枪手》重映定档-3-月
item.description:
According to Sina Movies, nine years after its initial release, the Thai film "Bad Genius," directed by Nattawut Poonpiriya and starring Chutimon Chuengcharoensukying, is scheduled for re-release in mainland China on March 20th. 据新浪电影消息，距首次上映九年，由纳塔吾·彭皮里亚执导，茱蒂蒙·琼查容苏因主演的泰国电影《天才枪手》中国内地重映定档 3 月 20 日。

The story is based on a real-life exam cheating scandal that rocked Asia in 2014, focusing on genius student Lynn and top student Bank, who team up with their friend Grace and rich kid Pat to plan and execute a transnational cheating scheme. 故事取材自 2014 年轰动亚洲的真实考场作弊事件，聚焦天才学生小琳与学霸少年班克携手好友格蕾斯、富二代小巴共同策划并完成一场跨国作弊案。

The film was first released in mainland China in October 2017, with a cumulative box office of 270 million. 该片于 2017 年 10 月在中国内地首次上映，累计票房 2.7 亿。

item.title: 《克里斯托弗一家》定档 4 月
item.guid: 《克里斯托弗一家》定档-4-月
item.description:
According to "Hollywood Reporter," Steven Soderbergh's new film "The Christofers" has recently been officially scheduled for release in selected North American cinemas on April 10th. 据「守望好莱坞」消息，史蒂文·索德伯格导演新片《克里斯托弗一家》近期正式定档，将于 4 月 10 日北美选定影院上映。

The film tells the story of a famous elderly artist's estranged relative seeking help from a struggling young artist to steal and complete the elder's unfinished work. 该片讲述了一个著名老艺术家那关系疏远的亲戚向一个苦苦挣扎的年轻艺术家寻求帮助，要去窃取老者未做完的作品并将其完成的故事。

The film is directed by Steven Soderbergh, written by Ed Solomon, and stars Ian McKellen, Jessica Gunning, James Corden, Michaela Coel, among others. It premiered on September 7, 2025, at the Toronto International Film Festival. 影片由史蒂文·索德伯格执导、艾德·索罗门编剧，伊恩·麦克莱恩、杰西卡·古宁、詹姆斯·柯登、米凯拉·科尔等主演，于 2025 年 9 月 7 日在多伦多国际电影节首映。

早报
